title: Diagnose codex-runner workflow state
objective: Inspect .github/workflows/codex-runner.yml and create governance/codex/proofs/bem522_workflow_diag.txt with: current runs-on value, whether OPENAI_API_KEY is passed to Execute task, whether codex exec is used, whether Python executor remains, and whether workflow_dispatch is the only trigger. Commit the proof file. No issue comments.
